commit.message:
Implement subtraction operation (#11)

Add support for subtracting numbers from left to right via the 'mathcli subtract' command.

Implementation:
- New subtract() function in operations.py with left-to-right logic
- CLI integration with argparse subcommand
- Comprehensive test suite with 11 test cases (100% coverage)
- Supports integers, floats, negative numbers, and multiple arguments
- Properly rebased on main - preserves add and multiply functionality

All acceptance criteria met:
- Accepts 2+ numeric arguments
- Subtracts left-to-right (100 - 25 - 10 - 5 = 60)
- Handles edge cases (negatives, zero, floats)
- Full test coverage
- Clean code following PEP 8
- No regression (add and multiply still work)

Closes #4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code Reviewer <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Agregados estilos para temas Light y Dark

Problema: El selector de temas en /settings no funcionaba porque
no había estilos CSS definidos para .light y .dark.

Solución:
- Agregados estilos CSS para tema claro (.light)
- Agregados estilos CSS para tema oscuro (.dark)
- Tema claro: fondos blancos/grises claros
- Tema oscuro: fondos azules oscuros (ya existía)

Ahora el selector de temas funciona correctamente:
- ☀️ Light: Tema claro con fondo blanco
- 🖥️ System: Usa la preferencia del sistema
- 🌙 Dark: Tema oscuro (original)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement zero-copy decode/render pipeline and Flutter test app

Add the Windows decode→render pipeline (MfVideoDecoder, D3D11ColorConverter,
D3D11SwapChainRenderer) with a Flutter test app that renders hardware-decoded
H.264 frames to a Texture widget via DXGI shared handle — zero CPU copies.

Key additions:
- MfVideoDecoder: Media Foundation HW H.264 decoder with async MFT support
- D3D11SwapChainRenderer: SwapChain-based renderer for standalone testing
- CreateSharedBGRATexture: cross-device GPU texture sharing via DXGI handle
- Flutter test app with LumenTextureBridge (decode thread + GpuSurfaceTexture)
- LumenDecoderPlugin: MethodChannel plugin (startDecode/stopDecode/getStats)
- H264FileReader: NAL parser extracted for reuse

commit.message:
perf: expand exclusion list and switch default to Fast compression

Adds ~40 new exclusion patterns covering browser caches, Teams/Slack/Discord,
Windows Update downloads, crash dumps, upgrade staging ($Windows.~BT/WS),
prefetch, WER, npm/pip/NuGet caches, Steam, and UWP app local caches.
Fast (XPRESS) compression is effectively free on HDD/SATA SSD because
the disk read speed is the bottleneck, not the CPU.

Add /posts/<slug> route for linking individual posts

Slugs are defined in /data/slugs.txt (format: "slug index" per line),

Unknown slugs render a not-found page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use raw script tag for AdSense to ensure SSR visibility

Next.js Script component renders preload hints instead of actual script
tags in SSR HTML, which AdSense crawler cannot detect. Using a raw
<script> tag ensures it appears in the initial server-rendered HTML.

Claude/check ga4 installation k qr0r (#10) * Add GA4 (G-TMPSPTL3Y6) dual-tracking alongside Vercel Analytics - Add gtag.js script to layout.tsx with afterInteractive strategy - Rewrite analytics.ts to fire all events to both Vercel Analytics and GA4 - Fix trackPurchase: was hardcoded to value:500, now accepts priceUsd param - Update success/page.tsx to fetch live price before firing purchase event - GA4 purchase event uses standard ecommerce schema (transaction_id, value, currency, items) https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Fix 5 hero/pricing quick wins from audit - Remove brand-speak italic tagline from hero (noise for cold visitors) - Reduce hero CTAs from 3 to 2 (remove 'Book 15-Min Call', it lives in Final CTA) - Flip hero price frame: guarantee ($20K+) leads, price line follows - Use dynamic priceUsd in hero price line (was hardcoded $500) - Replace Pricing H2 product label with outcome copy: 'Stop the Bleed in 5 Days' - analytics.ts trackPurchase already uses actual price — confirmed no change needed https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Address audit items 6–10: testimonials, video caption, ICP/scorecard copy, mid-page CTA - #6 TrustSection: add 3 attributed audit client testimonials with savings/results - #7 VideoPlayer: add caption beneath video ("Watch: How the audit works (4 min)") - #8 HeroSection: sharpen scorecard button to "Score Your AI Readiness (2 min)" + sub-label - #9 HeroSection: tighten ICP pill to "For 6-Figure Coaches Running on Manual Workflows" - #10 page.tsx: inject mid-page CTA band after DeliverablesSection for high-intent visitors https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Fix no-unsafe-function-type lint error in analytics.ts Replace bare `Function` type with `(...args: unknown[]) => void` to satisfy @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-function-type and unblock Vercel build. https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Fix exit intent popup copy and line breaks - Remove forced
causing headline orphan; use text-balance +   instead - Unify time claim to "Under 2 minutes" (was "2 minutes" then "90 seconds") - Replace vague "Big 4 departments" with outcome-focused body copy - Swap guilt-trip dismiss for neutral "No thanks, maybe later" - Improve CTA from "Start My Full Scorecard" to "Get My Free Scorecard" https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Fix scorecard infinite spinner on score generation failure - page.tsx: Add else-redirect so any API response (success or error) advances past the calculating step — previously a non-success response left the spinner running indefinitely - generate-score route: Make sendScoreEmail and syncLeadToGHL fire-and-forget so a missing RESEND_API_KEY or GHL misconfiguration can't block or 500 the score response * Add maxDuration=60 to generate-score route Default Vercel timeout (10s hobby / 30s pro) is too short for gpt-4o. Scorecard was silently timing out and leaving users on the spinner. * Fix RESEND_API_KEY env var name — should be RESEND_API_KEY_TOKEN All 3 API routes were silently skipping email sends because they looked for RESEND_API_KEY instead of RESEND_API_KEY_TOKEN: - generate-score: score email to leads - lead-capture: lead notification + user thank-you - webhook/stripe: purchase confirmation email * Add Notion as lead capture fallback - Create src/lib/notion.ts with syncLeadToNotion() — posts to the 'Scorecard Leads' Notion DB (fa4d9a5b6534435aa0a54adfd3d505c0) - Wire into lead-capture route: captures name/email/source/answers - Wire into generate-score route: captures full score, grade, savings, key finding alongside GHL sync - Both routes now fire-and-forget (GHL + Notion) so a missing key in either service never blocks the user response Requires NOTION_API_KEY in Vercel env vars to activate. * Replace dev-facing trust badges with benefit micro-copy on scorecard Swap 'Typeform Style Flow / GHL Integrated / AI Scored' (meaningless to users) with '5 minutes · No credit card · Real dollar estimates' — addresses the top 3 hesitations before clicking Start. * Auto-advance on select + hide bonus callout - ScorecardSurvey: clicking an option auto-advances after 420ms (Typeform-style). Uses a cancelable ref so changing answer before the delay fires always uses the last selected option. - score-thank-you: hide bonus callout (video walkthrough offer not ready yet) — commented out with TODO, preserved in ROADMAP.md backlog. * Fix wrong email sent to scorecard leads lead-capture was sending buildApplicationReceivedEmail ('Mike is reviewing your application...') — meant for the main page booking form, not the scorecard. Scorecard users get buildScoreEmail from /api/generate-score instead (grade, savings, opportunities, checklist). Removed the duplicate user-facing email from lead-capture; internal LEAD_NOTIFY_EMAIL notification is kept. * Fix unclosed JSX comment causing build failure * Restructure TrustSection: 4-stat Results Delivered aligned to Big 4 + move testimonials below with 'What Customers Say' title - Results Delivered now has 4 stats: Marketing (250K email list), Sales (5K/mo MRR), Delivery (7-Figure launch), Operations (40 hrs/wk recovered) - Each stat labeled with its Big 4 department name above - Results Delivered moved above testimonials - Testimonials renamed to 'What Customers Say' * Remove duplicate testimonials row above Results Delivered The same three testimonials appeared twice — once in an unlabelled block above the Results Delivered stats, and again under "What Customers Say". Removed the redundant top block. https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Match scorecard category pill colors to Results Delivered Big 4 colors Marketing=green, Sales=blue, Delivery=orange, Operations=gold — consistent with the color coding on the TrustSection Results Delivered stats. https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Redesign lead notification email with branded HTML template Replace plain-text lead alert with a fully styled dark-theme HTML email: - Color-coded sections per Big 4 category (green/blue/orange/gold) - Human-readable question labels instead of raw keys - Lead card with name, email, mode badge, and Reply CTA button - Plain-text fallback for email clients that don't render HTML https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Add fallback email when score generation fails If OpenAI is missing/fails/returns bad JSON, send the user a "we're on it" Application Received email so they always get something. Also move req.json() before the API key check so name/email are available in the early-exit fallback path. https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Add Gemini fallback when OpenAI fails in generate-score - Extract callLLM() helper: tries gpt-4o first, falls back to gemini-2.0-flash - Gemini uses its OpenAI-compatible endpoint — same request shape, no SDK needed - Reads GEMINI_API_KEY from env; logs clear warnings on each provider failure - Final catch still sends fallback email if both providers fail Add GEMINI_API_KEY to Vercel env vars to enable. * Upgrade Gemini fallback from 2.0-flash to 2.5-pro * Don't make users wait for LLM — redirect immediately, score delivers via email - scorecard/page.tsx: fire generate-score as fire-and-forget, redirect to score-thank-you instantly instead of awaiting the LLM response - score-thank-you/page.tsx: update copy to be confident ('on its way now') rather than uncertain ('within a few minutes') Server-side function still runs to completion and sends the score email. Users no longer stare at a spinner for 30-60s. * Fix scorecard emails: proper copy, from name, and subjects Score email (buildScoreEmail — fires on success): - From: 'Mike @ rehabit.ai ' - Subject: 'Your AI Score: B+ (78/100) — $42K–$68K savings identified' - Contains: grade, score, key finding, savings range, top 3 opportunities, prioritized checklist, bonus video CTA, audit booking CTA Fallback email (fires if both LLMs fail): - New buildScorecardProcessingEmail — scorecard-specific copy, not audit application language - From: 'Mike @ rehabit.ai ' - Subject: 'Your AI Readiness Score is generating — rehabit.ai' - Lists what will be in the score report, sets expectation for 2nd email * Add tokenized scorecard results page with Big 4 department scores - Add department_scores (marketing/sales/delivery/operations 0-100) to ScoreResult type and LLM prompt - Encode ScoreResult as base64url token in generate-score API and attach to results URL — no database required - Build /scorecard-results page: animated score counter, circular progress ring, Big 4 animated progress bars with "biggest gap" callout, top 3 opportunities, and gated/locked implementation roadmap with audit CTA - Rewrite score email as teaser: text-based Big 4 bars + savings range + primary "View My Full Scorecard →" CTA linking to tokenized results page - Secondary audit CTA demoted in email; roadmap detail fully gated to results page https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA * Fix Notion DB: single full sync from generate-score, add department scores - Remove Notion sync from lead-capture route — it was creating partial rows (no score/grade) that appeared as the only record per user, because the generate-score sync was either failing silently or creating orphan duplicates - generate-score now owns the single Notion write with complete data: score, grade, savings range, key finding, business type, team size, etc. - Add departmentScores field to NotionLead + properties map so Big 4 scores land in a "Department Scores" column (format: "Mkt:72 / Sales:45 / Del:68 / Ops:55") - Add "Department Scores" text property to notion.ts property builder https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ft7wXR9v99HeqpDaXQBNoA --------- Co-authored-by: Claude

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add rationale for NaN handling in spatial aggregation

Enhanced each variable's NaN handling documentation with:
- Clear rationale explaining WHY each approach is used
- Temperature: NaN preserved because missing ≠ zero (prevents bias)
- Precipitation/Snowfall: NaN → 0 because missing = no event (meteorologically sound)
- Added explanatory notes showing division denominators (4 vs 5 in examples)
- Clarified that temperature excludes NaN from mean, while precip includes it as 0

This helps users understand the scientific reasoning behind different
NaN handling strategies for different meteorological variables.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: major graphics, animation, movement, and performance improvements

Movement & Animation:
- Overworld player now has acceleration/deceleration physics (800/600)
- Walk animation 50% faster (0.12→0.08s) and scales with velocity
- Idle transition when nearly stationary
- Battle animation FPS increased across all 8 types (idle 3, attack 8,
  hit 8, cast 5, defend/item/defeat 4, victory 3)

Visual Feedback:
- Sprite knockback on hit (6px offset with ease-out return)
- White flash on damage (3x brightness → fade 0.12s)
- Screen shake on hits (3.5 intensity normal, 9.0 crits)
- Miss/dodge system with gray "MISS" floating number
- Speed-based miss rate (10% base, 2-25% range)

Battle Backgrounds:
- Parallax layers now actually animate (subtle horizontal drift)
- Sky brightness pulses ±2.5% on 15s cycle
- Terrain changes crossfade (0.18s out, 0.22s in)

Battle Transitions:
- All 10 transition types slowed from ~0.12s to ~0.3s for visibility
- Individual timing proportionally scaled (fragments, spirals, etc.)

Performance:
- SpriteUtils cache capped at 200 entries with LRU eviction
- AutogrindSystem learned_patterns capped at 100 battles/region
- Ability/target frequency dicts capped at 50 entries
- Village/cave/dungeon scenes preloaded instead of load() on demand
- Fixed SteampunkOverworld parse error (extra tab)

fix: usar Parameters para tipar tx corretamente no Prisma transaction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use correct Claude Code hooks format with nested matcher/hooks arrays

The Claude Code hooks schema requires:
- matcher: { tools: [...] } (object, not string)
- hooks: [{ type: "command", command: "..." }] (array of hook entries)

The old format put command/matcher at the top level which caused
settings validation errors on Claude Code startup.

commit.message:
Run Docker container as root to allow apt-get installs

Jenkins mounts the workspace with -u 1000:1000 by default, which
prevents apt-get from writing to /var/lib/apt/lists/.
